title: Level 5: AI Lab Sabotage
briefing: An AI training run failed after the dataset was silently modified. The sabotage caused the model accuracy to collapse before a major demo.
solutionExplanation: Devika submitted a disguised dataset patch, used another person's terminal briefly, and the modified labels match her failed experiment branch.

suspects.name: Devika Saran
suspects.description: Worked on an alternative training approach that was rejected before the demo.

suspects.name: Arjun Nair
suspects.description: Managed training pipelines and GPU job scheduling.

suspects.name: Nitin Rao
suspects.description: Coordinated demo slides and presentation flow.

evidence.title: Training Failure Report
evidence.content: The model accuracy dropped from 91 percent to 43 percent after the 7:10 PM dataset update. The failure was caused by label mismatches in 320 validation records.

evidence.title: Dataset Patch Log
evidence.content: A patch named normalize_metadata_fix was merged at 7:10 PM. The patch description mentioned metadata formatting, but it also changed validation labels in the file val_labels.csv.

evidence.title: Commit Attribution Note
evidence.content: The dataset patch was submitted from Arjun Nair's terminal session. However, Arjun's badge log shows he was in the GPU server room during the exact commit time.

evidence.title: Terminal Activity Snapshot
evidence.content: At 7:08 PM, Devika Saran's account authenticated on Arjun's workstation for 4 minutes. The dataset patch was committed at 7:10 PM from that workstation.

evidence.title: Rejected Experiment Branch
evidence.content: Devika's rejected branch experiment/devika-alt-loss contained the same pattern of label remapping later found in the sabotaged validation file.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Devika Saran
evidence.content: Devika says she briefly used Arjun's workstation only to check GPU availability. She denies modifying the dataset.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Arjun Nair
evidence.content: Arjun says he left his workstation unlocked while checking GPU utilization in the server room. He claims he did not approve any dataset patch.

evidence.title: Data Curator Verification Log
evidence.content: Sara Khan completed dataset verification at 6:40 PM. At that time, validation labels passed all consistency checks.

evidence.title: Demo Coordinator Schedule
evidence.content: Nitin Rao was in the auditorium between 6:50 PM and 7:30 PM testing the projector and slides. He did not have repository write access.

evidence.title: AI Lab Timeline
evidence.content: 6:40 PM: Dataset verification passed. 7:08 PM: Devika authenticated on Arjun's workstation. 7:10 PM: normalize_metadata_fix patch was committed. 7:12 PM: Training job restarted. 7:45 PM: Accuracy collapsed to 43 percent.
